newsItem.headline: Diomande set to leave Sporting; Palace & Newcastle target €40-50M deal

newNews.reasoning: New source (The Hard Tackle) with updated Newcastle United interest and specific negotiation details (€40-50M despite €80M clause). Confirms Sporting willingness to negotiate below release clause. Not in existing news.

newsItem.headline: Midtjylland contract talks with Diao ongoing; no agreement yet reached

newNews.reasoning: New article revealing specific contract extension negotiations between Midtjylland and Diao's agent (contract until 2029). Details disagreement on terms. Not previously listed in existing news.

newsItem.headline: Faye completes rehabilitation in Germany; returns to Lorient training

newNews.reasoning: Recovery milestone confirming completion of rehab program in Germany. While injury recovery was tracked, this specific source and completion detail is new and validates his current playing status.

newsItem.headline: Campbell impactful in 82nd min as Brugge hold Atletico Madrid 3-3 in UCL

newNews.reasoning: New appearance detail: Campbell came on in 82nd minute (not just 'off bench') in UCL draw vs Atletico Madrid and was 'influential' causing havoc in final third. Regional source with specific match context not in existing news items.
